dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend _d = details
| extend raw = pack('temporary_id', temporary_id, 'risk_vector', risk_vector, 'risk_category', risk_category, 'risk_vector_label', risk_vector_label, 'grade', grade, 'severity', severity, 'severity_category', severity_category, 'affects_rating', affects_rating, 'first_seen', first_seen, 'last_seen', last_seen, 'duration', duration, 'evidence_key', evidence_key, 'rolledup_observation_id', rolledup_observation_id, 'impacts_risk_vector_details', impacts_risk_vector_details, 'remaining_decay', remaining_decay, 'remediated', remediated, 'comments', comments, 'assets', assets, 'tags', tags, 'details', details)
| extend rv = tolower(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.risk_vector)), tostring(_d.risk_vector), tostring(risk_vector)))
| extend gr = tolower(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.grade)), tostring(_d.grade), tostring(grade)))
| extend sev = iif(isnotnull(_d.severity), toreal(_d.severity), toreal(severity))
| extend sevcat = tolower(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.severity_category)), tostring(_d.severity_category), tostring(severity_category)))
| extend normalized_risk_state = case(gr in ('good','fair','warn','bad','neutral'), gr, sevcat in ('severe','material'), 'bad', sevcat == 'moderate', 'warn', sevcat == 'minor', 'fair', sev >= 7.0, 'bad', sev >= 4.0, 'warn', sev >= 1.0, 'fair', 'unknown')
| where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad')
| where rv in ('botnet_infections','spam_propagation','malware_servers','unsolicited_comm','potentially_exploited','ssl_certificates','patching_cadence','mobile_software','open_ports','file_sharing')
| extend _cguid = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.company_guid)), tostring(_d.company_guid), '')
| extend _evid = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.rolledup_observation_id)), tostring(_d.rolledup_observation_id), iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.evidence_key)), tostring(_d.evidence_key), iif(isnotempty(tostring(temporary_id)), tostring(temporary_id), hash_sha256(tostring(raw)))))
| project
    TimeGenerated = now(),
    company_guid = _cguid,
    company_name = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.company_name)), tostring(_d.company_name), ''),
    finding_uid = strcat(_cguid, ':', rv, ':', _evid),
    temporary_id = tostring(temporary_id),
    risk_category = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.risk_category)), tostring(_d.risk_category), tostring(risk_category)),
    risk_vector = rv,
    risk_vector_label = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.risk_vector_label)), tostring(_d.risk_vector_label), tostring(risk_vector_label)),
    finding_grade = gr,
    severity = sev,
    severity_category = sevcat,
    normalized_risk_state,
    affects_rating = tobool(affects_rating),
    first_seen = todatetime(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.first_seen)), tostring(_d.first_seen), tostring(first_seen))),
    last_seen = todatetime(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.last_seen)), tostring(_d.last_seen), tostring(last_seen))),
    duration = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.duration)), tostring(_d.duration), tostring(duration)),
    evidence_key = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.evidence_key)), tostring(_d.evidence_key), tostring(evidence_key)),
    rolledup_observation_id = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.rolledup_observation_id)), tostring(_d.rolledup_observation_id), tostring(rolledup_observation_id)),
    impacts_risk_vector_details = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.impacts_risk_vector_details)), tostring(_d.impacts_risk_vector_details), tostring(impacts_risk_vector_details)),
    remaining_decay = iif(isnotnull(_d.remaining_decay), toreal(_d.remaining_decay), toreal(remaining_decay)),
    remediated = iif(isnotnull(_d.remediated), tobool(_d.remediated), tobool(remediated)),
    comments = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.comments)), tostring(_d.comments), tostring(comments)),
    assets = assets,
    tags = iif(isnotnull(_d.tags), _d.tags, tags),
    details = _d,
    raw = raw
